full_text:
Chen Sun йҷіеӯ«
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Sun (йҷіеӯ«). Began pillaging the people of Jiangxia. Zhang Fei killed him in one blow. Chen Sun is a fictional character. Chen Sun was affiliated with Liu Biao. Chen Sun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
